findings.description: The explanatory comment `// 【説明】本実装例では、更新対象のデータを作成する処理は省略している` is omitted from the code block in s2. This comment informs the reader (and AI) that the data creation logic was intentionally left out of the example, which is relevant context for understanding the code's completeness.
findings.source_evidence: Source code block in 複数件を更新する場合: `// 【説明】本実装例では、更新対象のデータを作成する処理は省略している`

findings.description: The knowledge file says "JDBC標準機能のexecuteBatchと同じである" but the source text only says "JDBC標準機能と同じである" (display text of the cross-reference). The phrase "のexecuteBatch" is not present in the source text — it is an interpretation of the cross-reference label name `executeBatch-label`, not the rendered text.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `複数件を一括で更新する場合の注意点は、 :ref:`JDBC標準機能<executeBatch-label>` と同じである。` — display text is "JDBC標準機能", not "JDBC標準機能のexecuteBatch"
